title: Document comparison and changelog workflows
summary: Updated the public docs and README to cover recently added snapshot changelog generation, product-state comparison, the repository Compare tab, and related local API endpoints.
userVisibleChange: Readers can now find a dedicated Compare Product States guide, CLI examples for changelog and compare, README command references, and current API documentation for comparison and global snapshot endpoints.

risks.title: The worktree had unrelated pre-existing UI changes staged and unstaged; they were intentionally left out of the docs implementation commit and should be handled separately.

decisions.title: Use recent eve snapshots as the source of truth for documenting comparison behavior added after the docs site was created.
Add a focused guide instead of burying comparison details only in the review-history page.

validation.command: Reviewed recent eve snapshots for snapshot changelog and comparison changes: snap_d34262fb447bfc8a, snap_5b52eac10de0232a, snap_159493464e04a918, snap_9ce0f8d1cf051b74, snap_a7242680b3e63f4e, and snap_fb6eef8f327a580e.
